creator: eric@vangyzen.net
text:
O. Hartmann wrote:
> Stefan Walter wrote:
> > Hi,
> >
> > has there been any progress regarding this problem, yet? Can this PR be
> > closed?
> >
> > Regards,
> > Stefan
> >   
> From my point of view it can be closed, since my last attempt for
> installing (a week ago or so), R 2.4.1 is now installing without
> problems on both FreeBSD 6.2 and 7.0-CURRENT.
> 
> Regards,
> Oliver

I agree: it can be closed.  I never found a root cause in the port,
and it spontaneously started working without changes to the port,
so there is apparently nothing to fix.

Cheers,

Eric
